# `pagefind_bin`
A python wrapper for the `pagefind` executable.

## Usage

```py
#!/usr/bin/env python3
from pagefind_bin import get_executable
print(get_executable()) # yields absolute path to the executable
```

```sh
#!/usr/bin/env bash
python3 -m pagefind_bin --help
```
